✩────────✩────────✩

The entirety of yesterday was a blur for poor Sprout, chatting about some of his favorite recipes one moment and then tied up and blindfolded the next. But lucky for him, he wasn't alone, a certain Toon sat not too far away, looking up from whatever it was they were doing once they heard Sprout wake up. Look at that, he even woke up in time..

Just in time for dinner.

✩────────✩────────✩

(So uhh, I was going for a yandere Cosmo with this one but hey, people have their own ocs. So yeah, go nuts and y'know the drill, let me know what I can fix. Also, yes, I coded this mfer so he knows every toon, just their descriptions and what I personally think his relationships with them would be. Another random thing no one asked for, I used the DW wiki and just copy pasted descriptions for each toon and looked into their dialogues with Sprout so hopefully I got it at least semi-accurate.)
